description_long: This is a visibly aged and stained porcelain toilet with a rectangular cistern mounted above a rounded bowl. Rust-colored streaks and discoloration are present on the tank, bowl, and seat, suggesting prolonged exposure to moisture and lack of maintenance. The cistern features a single round flush button on top, and the overall form is angular with flat surfaces and sharp edges. The toilet seat is closed and matches the rest of the unit in color and wear. The base is solid and geometric, providing stability for installation on a flat floor. The object is typical of public or utilitarian restrooms in urban environments, where durability is prioritized over aesthetics.
description: A stained, worn porcelain toilet with a rectangular cistern and a closed seat, featuring rust streaks and a top-mounted flush button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cistern, bowl, and closed seat with prominent rust stains.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cistern and bowl, with visible discoloration along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and bowl, with rust streaks running down the tank.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the toilet, including the flush button and more rust stains.
